recommendations.title: Father & Soldier
recommendations.overview: 1917. Bakary Diallo enlists in the French army to join his 17-year-old son, Thierno, who has been forcibly recruited. Sent to the front, they will have to face the war together. While Thierno learns to become a man, Bakary will do everything to bring

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Operation Petticoat
recommendations.overview: A World War II submarine commander finds himself stuck with a damaged sub, a con-man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: The Windermere Children
recommendations.overview: The story of the pioneering project to rehabilitate child survivors of the Holocaust on the shores of Lake Windermere.

recommendations.title: The Tin Drum
recommendations.overview: In 1924, Oskar Matzerath is born in the Free City of Danzig. At age three, he falls down a flight of stairs and stops growing. In 1939, World War II breaks out.

recommendations.title: Shershaah
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the life of Captain Vikram Batra (PVC), the film celebrates his bravery, valiant spirit and honors his invaluable sacrifice during the Kargil War of 1999, at the age of 24.

recommendations.title: House of Flying Daggers
recommendations.overview: In 9th century China, a corrupt government wages war against a rebel army called the Flying Daggers. A romantic warrior breaks a beautiful rebel out of prison to help her rejoin her fellows, but things are not what they seem.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.
